title: Canada announces new international migration capacity-building projects - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada announces new international migration capacity-building projects
From: Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
As part of its ongoing work with international partners, Canada is investing in projects that help improve how migration is managed around the world. These investments support safe, orderly and regular migration, while also helping countries better integrate newcomers. This includes supporting better migration systems, training officials, and expanding safe and regular pathways for people to move between countries.
As part of its ongoing work with international partners, Canada is investing in projects that help improve how migration is managed around the world. These investments support safe, orderly and regular migration, while also helping countries better integrate newcomers. This includes supporting better migration systems, training officials, and expanding safe and regular pathways for people to move between countries.
Through the International Migration Capacity Building Program , Canada is funding a series of new projects that respond to shared migration challenges and opportunities. These projects support practical solutions, including improving labour mobility and employment opportunities for migrants, reinforcing regular pathways and enhancing border and migration management systems. By strengthening systems abroad, Canada helps support more effective migration pathways, reduce irregular migration, and contribute to global stability.
This work also supports Canada’s domestic priorities in maintaining a well-managed and sustainable immigration system.
Canada is supporting the following initiatives:
Country or countries
What the project will do
Strengthening Governance and Transparency of Labour Migration in Vietnam
International Organization for Migration
Strengthen labour migration systems and improve access to safe and regular migration pathways
MPI Migration Innovation Lab: Improving the Socioeconomic Integration of Migrants and Returnees in Colombia and Ecuador
Migration Policy Institute (MPI)
Help governments better coordinate migration policies and improve how migrants find jobs and integrate into communities
Institutional Strengthening and Responsible Practices in Labour Migration in the Dominican Republic
International Labour Organization, in partnership with UNICEF
Improve labour migration governance and strengthen protections for migrant workers and children
Country or countries
What the project will do
Integration of Migrants Through Regularization and Access to Employment in Costa Rica (Phase III)
International Organization for Migration
Improve systems that help migrants regularize their status and access jobs and essential services
Creating Opportunities for Safe and Regular Migration: Capacity Building in Latin America and the Caribbean
Latin America and the Caribbean
Pathways International
Support the development of safe migration pathways, including for work and protection
Country or countries
What the project will do
Improving Border Governance by Strengthening Preparedness and Response Capacities to Border Crises
International Organization for Migration
Strengthen border systems to better respond to crises while protecting people in situations of vulnerability.
Country or countries
What the project will do
Evidence and Capacity Building for Better Coordination and Information Sharing Among LGBTQI+ Refugees and Asylum Seekers and Their Organizations in Kenya
Mixed Migration Centre
Support partnerships with LGBTQI+ refugee-led organizations to better understand needs and improve supports
Improving Responses to Mixed Migration in Latin America – Phase II
Mixed Migration Centre
Collect and share data on migration trends to support better decisions and regional cooperation
News  Release - Canada strengthens international partnerships on migration
